commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts shared web fetch/search provider selection and credential helpers into a new private `@openclaw/web-content-core` package, keeps the old `src/web` shim, moves helper tests, and widens `Model` metadata types.

PR surface: Source +350, Tests +86, Config +31, Other +18. Total +485 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a refactor PR rather than a reported user bug. The blocking concerns are source-reviewable from the duplicated SecretRef parser and read-only merge-tree conflicts, while live provider behavior proof is still absent.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human owner/security review is needed because the PR has a protected maintainer label, credential-boundary changes, missing real behavior proof, and merge conflicts that automation should not resolve without the SecretRef ownership decision.

target.title: refactor: extract web content core package
target.body:
## Summary
- Extract web provider runtime helpers into new private `@openclaw/web-content-core` package with generated dist exports.
- Keep the existing `src/web/provider-runtime-shared.ts` import path as a source shim for current runtime callers.
- Move the helper tests into the package and update the compat registry test pointer.
- Align the public `Model` type with existing runtime metadata fields surfaced by the current base (`contextTokens`, provider `params`, and `mediaInput`).

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/web-content-core/src/provider-runtime-shared.test.ts src/web-fetch/runtime.test.ts src/web-search/runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/web-content-core/src/provider-runtime-shared.test.ts src/web-fetch/runtime.test.ts src/web-search/runtime.test.ts src/plugins/compat/registry.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.test.ts packages/web-content-core/src/provider-runtime-shared.test.ts src/web-fetch/runtime.test.ts src/web-search/runtime.test.ts src/plugins/compat/registry.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- `pnpm build`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: refactors shared web fetch/search provider credential and selection helpers into a package without changing caller behavior.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout, Node/pnpm repo toolchain.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest web/provider/model tests, changed check, root build, autoreview.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed; `pnpm check:changed` passed; `pnpm build` passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: existing web fetch/search runtime tests and compat registry tests stay green with the package shim and moved tests; model runtime metadata type checks are green on current `origin/main`.
What was not tested: live web provider API calls.
target.author: steipete
